summary:
Angiofibromas extending to one or more paranasal sinuses are classified as Stage II according to established staging systems like Radkowski and Andrews-Fisch, wherein sinonasal invasion constitutes a defining feature of this stage rather than an advanced form leading directly to Stage III.  

Final Answer: B

Final Answer: B. Answer choice: B
